title: calystegia occidentalis var. tomentella
intro: Calystegia occidentalis var. tomentella, also known as the woolly morning glory or hairy bindweed, is a plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calystegia occidentalis var. tomentella include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
